title: Artifact Delta Contract v1
description: Draft schema for delta-friendly artifact updates. Defines a structured set of changes (additions, modifications, deletions) applied to research artifacts.

delta_id.description: Unique identifier for this delta set.

target_artifact_id.description: Identifier of the artifact being patched.

target_artifact_type.description: The type of the target research artifact.

base_version.description: The version of the artifact before applying this delta.

new_version.description: The version of the artifact after applying this delta.

changes.description: The sequence of differential changes to apply.

path.description: JSON pointer or path within the artifact schema.

value.description: The value to add, replace, or append. Required for add, replace, and append.
